title: Smoky Mushroom Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful soup made with smoky mushrooms and tunisian spices. Perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the smoky paprika, tunisian spice blend, and chicken broth.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Purée the soup with an immersion blender or regular blender.
Return the soup to the pot and add the water.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
